feed.title: realufo.org — every archive, latest records
feed.subtitle: Cross-archive Atom feed of the 100 most recent declassified UAP records across 15 government sources.

entry.title: IPACO® team (2025)
entry.summary: GEIPAN's IPACO® image/video authentication software team.

entry.title: NASA UAP 2024 Annual Report
entry.summary: NASA annual report on UAP research activities and findings.

entry.title: UAP Disclosure Act — NARA Implementation Guidance
entry.summary: NARA guidance on implementation of the UAP Disclosure Act of 2023.

entry.title: Cases by Phenomenon Type (2024)
entry.summary: GEIPAN's 2024 breakdown of identified phenomena.

entry.title: Starlink satellite flare note
entry.summary: GEIPAN's 2024 information note on Starlink-related misidentifications.

entry.title: SEFAA dispatch — January 2024
entry.summary: SEFAA monthly resolved-cases report for January 2024.

entry.title: NZDF — UFO/UAP reporting OIA response (2024-5199)
entry.summary: More recent OIA response on NZDF's UFO/UAP reporting practices — clarifies the post-2010 division of responsibility between NZDF and the Civil Aviation Authority.

entry.title: NASA UAP Independent Study Team — Final Report
entry.summary: The 36-page final report of the NASA UAP Independent Study Team (Sep 2023). Recommends a unified data-collection strategy, expanded use of NASA Earth-observing assets, and AI/ML for anomaly detection. Led by astrophysicist David Spergel.

entry.title: UAP Independent Study Team — Terms of Reference
entry.summary: Signed charter establishing the UAP Independent Study Team. Defines scope, deliverables, and the 9-month study period (June 2022 → Mar 2023).

entry.title: Public Meeting Agenda — May 31, 2023
entry.summary: Agenda for the NASA UAP Independent Study Team public meeting held May 31 2023. Lists every team member presentation and topic.

entry.title: Federal Register Notice — UAP Public Meeting
entry.summary: Official Federal Register notice announcing the NASA UAP Independent Study Team public meeting and inviting public participation.

entry.title: Media Briefing: UAP Independent Study Report (Sep 14, 2023)
entry.summary: NASA holds a media briefing to discuss the findings of the UAP Independent Study Team Report. Administrator Bill Nelson opens; study lead David Spergel presents findings.

entry.title: NASA UAP Telecon — Pre-meeting Briefing
entry.summary: Pre-meeting press telecon held ahead of the May 31 2023 UAP Independent Study Team public meeting.

entry.title: UAP Independent Study Team Public Meeting (May 31, 2023)
entry.summary: Full 4-hour public meeting of the NASA UAP Independent Study Team. Each panellist presents their analysis tasking; Q&A from press and public.

entry.title: UAP Study Team — Public Meeting Group Photo
entry.summary: Group photo of the NASA UAP Independent Study Team at the May 31 2023 public meeting at NASA HQ.

entry.title: UAP Final Report — Cover
entry.summary: Cover image of the UAP Independent Study Team final report (Sep 2023). Northern hemisphere of earth, deep black background.

entry.title: NASA UAP Independent Study Team — Final Report (Sep 2023)
entry.summary: The 36-page final report of the NASA UAP Independent Study Team.

entry.title: UAP Independent Study Team — Terms of Reference
entry.summary: Signed charter establishing the UAP Independent Study Team.

entry.title: Public Meeting Agenda — May 31, 2023
entry.summary: Agenda for the NASA UAP Independent Study Team public meeting.

entry.title: Federal Register Notice — UAP Public Meeting
entry.summary: Official Federal Register notice announcing the NASA UAP public meeting.

entry.title: NASA UAP Director Appointment — Press Release
entry.summary: Press release announcing Dr. Mark McInerney as inaugural NASA UAP Research Director.

entry.title: 2024 National Defense Authorization Act — Public Law 118-31
entry.summary: The 2024 NDAA established Record Group 615 ('Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena Records Collection') at NARA, mandating that federal agencies transfer UAP records and authorising a 25-year sealing review.

entry.title: SEFAA dispatch — December 2023
entry.summary: SEFAA monthly resolved-cases report for December 2023.

entry.title: SEFAA dispatch — November 2023
entry.summary: SEFAA monthly resolved-cases report for November 2023.

entry.title: NZDF — UAP/UFO/USO OIA response (2023-4763)
entry.summary: NZDF's response to a 2023 OIA request on contemporary UAP/UFO/USO reporting procedure. Confirms NZDF no longer maintains a UFO file but redirects to Civil Aviation Authority.

entry.title: SEFAA dispatch — annual 2022
entry.summary: SEFAA 2022 annual archive of monthly resolved-cases dispatches.

entry.title: GEIPAN — FAQ (English)
entry.summary: Official press FAQ — history, methodology, classification scheme.

entry.title: GEIPAN — FAQ (Français)
entry.summary: Dossier de presse officiel — historique, méthodologie, classification PAN A/B/C/D.

entry.title: GEIPAN — Mission, History, Methodology (English)
entry.summary: Mission, 1977-present history, scientific methodology, PAN A/B/C/D taxonomy.

entry.title: GEIPAN — Mission, Historique, Méthodologie (Français)
entry.summary: Document officiel — mission, historique, méthodologie, classification PAN A/B/C/D.

entry.title: SEFAA dispatch — annual 2021
entry.summary: SEFAA 2021 annual archive of monthly resolved-cases dispatches.

entry.title: Saint-Germain-en-Laye (78) — 30 May 2020
entry.summary: Witness video of an unidentified luminous object.

entry.title: DGAC — CEFAA→SEFAA transition announcement
entry.summary: DGAC's announcement of the 2020 transition from CEFAA (Comité) to SEFAA (Sección) — formalising the unit's place inside the directorate.

entry.title: SEFAA dispatch — annual 2020
entry.summary: SEFAA 2020 annual archive — first year operating under new SEFAA designation.

entry.title: Lyon (69) — 19 December 2019
entry.summary: Witness video of an unidentified phenomenon.

entry.title: DGAC — CEFAA: An Investigative Model for Anomalous Aerial Phenomena
entry.summary: DGAC's 2019 white paper laying out CEFAA's methodology and case work. Sets out the civilian-aviation framework that later became SEFAA.

entry.title: DGAC — CEFAA: An Investigative Model for Anomalous Aerial Phenomena (2019)
entry.summary: DGAC's 2019 white paper laying out CEFAA's methodology and case work — sets out the civilian-aviation framework that later became SEFAA.

entry.title: Tranche 5 — final OVNI release (Dec 2016)
entry.summary: Fifth and final tranche closing the OVNI declassification programme — covers reports 2010-2016.

entry.title: FAB Notimp 173 (21/06/2015) — UFO reporting update
entry.summary: A 2015 FAB update reaffirming the role of COMDABRA (Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command) in receiving and cataloging UFO reports.

entry.title: Final Tranche of UFO Files Released — Press Release
entry.summary: TNA's press release accompanying the final tranche (24 files, 6,000+ pages spanning 1994–2000) — closing the MoD's 50-year UFO investigation programme.

entry.title: Final Tranche of UFO Files Released — Press Release (2013)
entry.summary: TNA press release accompanying the final tranche (24 files, 6,000+ pages spanning 1994–2000) — closing the MoD's 50-year UFO investigation programme.

entry.title: FAB Notimp 250 (08/09/2013) — OVNI policy ordinance
entry.summary: The 2013 FAB instruction (COMAER) that formalised the procedure for registering, handling, and forwarding UFO reports to the Arquivo Nacional.

entry.title: Tranche 4 — V COMAR Recife files (May 2013)
entry.summary: Fourth release: V COMAR Recife regional command records + 1986 "Noite Oficial dos UFOs" radar contacts.

entry.title: Tranche 3 — Operação Prato + Colares files (Mar 2011)
entry.summary: Third release including the full Operação Prato (Operation Saucer) investigation — mass UFO sightings over Colares, Pará (1977).

entry.title: Tranche 2 — CINDACTA + ITA documents (Mar 2010)
entry.summary: Second OVNI release: CINDACTA air-traffic-control records + ITA institute documents.

entry.title: Tranche 1 — initial OVNI release (Mar 2008)
entry.summary: First Arquivo Nacional OVNI release: documents from COMDABRA, IV COMAR, V COMAR covering 1952-1980.
